features.name: module instantiation triggering cross_file_elaboration
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that causes the elaborator to process another module's scope

features.name: case statement with constant condition in unreachable if block
features.description: Code should include a case statement with constant condition 1'b0 inside an if block with constant condition 1'b0
features.snippet:
if (1'b0) begin
    case (1'b0)
    1'b0: begin
    // end
    endcase
end

features.name: nonblocking assignment in nested if inside case item
features.description: Code should include a nonblocking assignment inside a nested if statement within a case item
features.snippet:
case (1'b0)
1'b0: begin
    if (1'b0) begin
        x <= 1'b0;
    end
end
1'b1: begin
end
endcase

features.name: always_comb with multiple case statements in unreachable if blocks
features.description: Code should include an always @(*) block containing multiple case statements each inside unreachable if blocks with constant conditions
features.snippet:
always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
        case (1'b0)
        1'b0: begin
        endcase
    end
end

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
